text.title: Terraform Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: remote state + CI-only apply + drift detection
local state acceptable; provider pins still required
TF Cloud / Enterprise + Sentinel policies + OIDC trust
skip-this-methodology — use a shell script or manual

example.note: Environment scope? → matches branch "scope == shared_team_env" → conclusion ref=r2-remote-state-with-locking
